mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Committee for Cassie Smith, a peron of unsound mind
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Committee for Cassie Smith, a peron of unsound mind A.P. Harman, Sheriff of Floyd and as such her Committee R.L. Clark, Committee for Cassie Smith in West Virginia in which state she was living by 11.01.1911 Recorded in Ledger Book 7, page 353, of the Floyd County Circuit Court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
